/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/openpdf_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/src/PDFViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/src/PDFPageWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openpdf.dir/src/Annotation.cpp.o -o openpdf  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 -lpoppler-qt6 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
